modmenu.descriptionTranslation.preventer: A mod that prevents you from doing dumb things by accident!
preventer.general.info.keyBindLocation: Keybinds can be changed in the Minecraft Keybinds menu
tooltip.preventer.notifyToggledOff: Displays an info message when the override key is pressed while Preventer is toggled off
text.preventer.welcomeToast: To enable preventer modules head to the settings or press I. If you want to temporarily disable all modules, hold the override key R.
text.preventer.moduleUseInfo: Below you can toggle Module Notifications, which will be displayed if a module prevented an action
text.preventer.missingFeatures: Missing any modules? Suggest them on GitHub!
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventPa: Prevents you from creating path blocks
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventTr: Prevents you from opening trapped chests
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventRo:
§lOFF§r: Module disabled 
Prevents rocket use in:
§lBOTH§r: Both hands
§lMAIN_HAND§r: The main hand
§lOFF_HAND§r: The off hand
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventBe: Prevents you using beds in the End or Nether dimension
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventDr: Prevents you from teleporting the dragon egg by using it
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventRe:
Prevents you from placing, eating, using, ... items
with a custom name (except tools, weapons, and armor)
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventNo: Prevents you from changing the pitch of note blocks
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventRe: Prevents you from using respawn anchors in the overworld and the end
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventGr: Prevents you from using bone meal on grass blocks (including (warped)nylium)
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventCh:
Prevents you only from editing signs on chests,
normal sign editing is still enabled
Prevents you from accidentally placing books in chiseled bookshelves or removing them
preventer.interactions.tooltip.preventIt: Prevents from interacting with item frames
preventer.plants.tooltip.preventGlowBerr: Prevents you from harvesting Glow Berries
preventer.plants.tooltip.preventSweetBer: Prevents you from harvesting Sweet Berries
preventer.plants.tooltip.preventNonMatur:
Prevents you from harvesting 
(breaking) non-mature crops
preventer.plants.prevented.preventNonMat: §4The targeted crop is not yet mature§4
preventer.plants.tooltip.preventStemBrea: Prevents you from breaking pumpkin/melon stems
preventer.plants.tooltip.preventSugarCan:
Prevents you from breaking the lowest
block of sugar cane/bamboo/cactus
preventer.plants.tooltip.preventFarmland:
Prevents you from jumping when on farmland. 
Note: Due to limitations this does not work when jumping from a non-farmland block to a farmland block
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventBuddin: Prevents you from breaking budding amethyst blocks
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventItemFr: Prevents you from breaking item frames (and glowing item frames)
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventGlassB: Prevents you from breaking glass and glass panes
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventSuspic:
§lOFF§r: Module disabled
§lNORMAL§r: Prevents you from breaking suspicious sand and gravel
§lENHANCED§r: Prevents you from breaking a block if there is a suspicious block above it.
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventEnderC: Prevents you from breaking ender chests without a silk touch pickaxe
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventSpawne: Prevents you from breaking monster spawners
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventChestB: Prevents you from breaking chests with an axe
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventCarpet:
Prevents you from breaking carpets,
including moss carpets
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventImmatu: Prevents you from breaking immature amethyst crystals
preventer.breaking.tooltip.preventBreaki: Prevents you from breaking blocks with a sword, trident or mace
preventer.placing.tooltip.preventCoralPl: Prevents you from placing corals out of water
preventer.placing.prevented.preventCoral: §4Out of water coral placing was prevented§4
preventer.placing.tooltip.preventWaterPl: Prevents you from placing water in the nether
preventer.placing.tooltip.preventOffhand: Prevents you from placing blocks in your off-hand
preventer.placing.tooltip.preventBerrieP: Prevents you from planting berries while trying to eat them (Sweet Berries & Glow Berries)
preventer.placing.tooltip.preventPlacing:
§lOFF§r: Module disabled
§lALL§r: Temporary prevents you from placing blocks after eating
§lTORCHES§r: Temporary prevents you only from placing torches after eating a food item
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventZombi: Prevents you from attacking Zombified Piglins
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventEndCr: Prevents you from hitting end crystals
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventGolem: Prevents you from attacking iron & snow golems
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventNamed: Prevents you from attacking mobs with a custom name
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventTamed:
Prevents you from attacking animals that have
been tamed by a player (e.g. dogs, cats, ...)
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventRareM: Prevents you from attacking rare mobs (parrots, axolotls, allays)
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventHorse:
Prevents you from attacking horses and similar creatures
(Horses (including Skeleton & Zombie Horses), Donkeys, Mules, Llamas, Camels)
preventer.attacking.tooltip.preventNeutr:
§lOFF§r: module is disabled
§lFULL§r: prevents you from attacking neutral mobs
§lPIGLIN_EXCEPTION§r: allows hitting piglins if you're not wearing gold armor
preventer.miscellaneous.tooltip.lowDurab:
Prevents tools & weapons from
breaking due to low durability
preventer.miscellaneous.prevented.lowDur: §4Tool usage prevented due to low durability§4
preventer.miscellaneous.tooltip.preventT: Prevents you from dropping tools and swords out of your hotbar
preventer.miscellaneous.tooltip.preventR: Prevents you from dropping items with a custom name
preventer.miscellaneous.tooltip.preventS: Prevents you from sprinting while underwater
preventer.miscellaneous.tooltip.hideTote: Hides totems of undying in the offhand
preventer.general.tooltip.actionPrevente:
§lOFF§r: No info shown
§lMINIMAL§r: ❌ as info
§lDEFAULT§r: General action prevented info message
§lAUDIO§r: Plays a sound when an action is prevented
§lLEGACY§r: Shows module specific messages for some modules
preventer.general.option.showLowDurabili: Always show low durability protection warning
preventer.general.tooltip.showLowDurabil:
Shows the low durability protection warning,
even the action prevented info is turned off
